when_not: Fewer than 4 points or more than 6 series
accessibility: Differentiate series by line style not color alone

when_not: More than 15 categories or a time dimension
accessibility: Label each bar value and offer a sort control

when_not: More than 5 slices or differences under 5 percent
accessibility: Add value labels; never rely on color alone

when_not: Categorical data or fewer than 20 points
accessibility: Combine color and shape; provide a data table

when_to_use: Shape and spread of one numeric variable
when_not: Fewer than 20 data points
accessibility: Describe axis bins clearly in text

when_to_use: Show median quartiles and outliers across groups
when_not: Fewer than 20 points per group
accessibility: Include a stats summary table and annotate outliers

when_to_use: Intensity across a 2D grid or calendar
when_not: Fewer than 20 cells or exact values needed
accessibility: Add pattern overlay and value on hover

when_not: Non-spatial data or very uneven region sizes
accessibility: Pair color scale with legend plus text labels

when_not: Non-sequential or non-decreasing values
accessibility: State conversion percent as text per stage

when_to_use: Single metric against a defined target
when_not: No target exists or many unrelated KPIs
accessibility: Show value and percent of target as text

when_to_use: Many KPIs side by side in tight space
when_not: Single emphasized KPI or no target range
accessibility: Keep all values visible as text; label ranges

when_not: No baseline or confidence too low to be useful
accessibility: Toggle actual-only view; describe the band in text

when_to_use: Monitor a time-series for outliers and spikes
when_not: Predefined categorical anomalies
accessibility: Mark anomalies by shape not color; add text alerts

when_not: Hierarchy deeper than 3 levels or flat data
accessibility: Always provide a drill-down and table alternative

when_to_use: Nested proportions where hierarchy and size matter
when_not: More than 3 levels or precise comparison needed
accessibility: Mandatory table alternative beyond two levels

when_to_use: How positive and negative parts reach a total
when_not: Non-additive changes or more than 12 bars
accessibility: Add directional arrow per bar plus value labels

when_to_use: Compare entities across a fixed attribute set
when_not: More than 8 axes or precise comparison needed
accessibility: Limit to 5-8 axes; offer a grouped bar fallback

when_not: Non-financial audience or no OHLC data
accessibility: Provide OHLC table; use fill vs outline patterns

when_not: More than 500 nodes without clustering
accessibility: Inaccessible alone; provide structured alternative

when_not: Looping flows or fewer than 3 source-target pairs
accessibility: Convey flow with labels and a path summary table

when_to_use: Fraction of a whole shown visually
when_not: More than 5 categories or exact values matter
accessibility: More accessible than pie; always label percent

when_not: Updates slower than once per minute
accessibility: Require pause/resume; show current value as text

when_to_use: Break a metric into contributing factors
when_not: No clear parent-child causal link
accessibility: Keyboard-navigable expand/collapse with SR announcements

when_to_use: Scientific context where Z-axis is essential
when_not: 2D conveys it or on mobile
accessibility: Fundamentally inaccessible; must not be sole output

when_not: Precise values matter or screen-reader primary
accessibility: Fails screen readers; never the sole output of NLP
